name: Recruitee ATS API
what_it_does: Recruitee REST API for collaborative applicant tracking system. Enables AI agents to query job openings, retrieve candidate profiles and applications, access pipeline stage data, and integrate recruiting intelligence into HR workflows. Recruitee is known for its team-based collaborative hiring approach and modern API design.
use_cases: Querying job opening status and candidate pipeline from talent analytics agents
Retrieving candidate application and disqualification data from HR reporting agents
Managing job posting workflows and pipeline configurations from recruiting automation agents
Integrating Recruitee data into HRIS and onboarding systems from HR workflow agents
not_for: Enterprise talent acquisition at Fortune 500 scale
Automated candidate screening without human review
best_when: A growing company using Recruitee wants AI agents to surface pipeline metrics, track candidate velocity, and integrate recruiting data into HR reporting workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate application data including resumes and interview feedback is sensitive. Automated screening without human review risks EEOC violations.

auth.notes: Recruitee API token authentication. Tokens generated per user in profile settings. Company-subdomain-scoped API.

pricing.notes: SMB/mid-market ATS with free tier for small teams. Good European data residency options.

performance.rate_limits: Recruitee API: 60 req/min documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate PII and hiring data subject to GDPR (EU data residency default)
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API rate limit: 60 req/min — throttle for bulk candidate queries
Company subdomain required in API URL — configure per Recruitee account
GDPR right-to-erasure must be implemented for candidate data deletion
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Candidate application data under GDPR. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency by default. API token auth. EEOC considerations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Candidate hiring data under GDPR. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency default. GDPR erasure compliance required.
